dimensions.algorithms: Evaluates candidate choice of data structures, computational complexity awareness, and efficiency trade-offs.
dimensions.system_design: Evaluates component decoupling, scaling approaches, API interface boundary definition, and bottleneck identification.
dimensions.debugging: Evaluates code navigation, root-cause isolation speed, and edge case correction patterns.
dimensions.code_quality_reasoning: Evaluates clean code philosophy, readability choices, naming conventions, and structural maintainability reasoning.
